leadText: The Grubby Hanky (Japanese: よごれたハンカチ Dirty Handkerchief) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] On a Thursday , this misplaced handkerchief can be returned to its owner, a regular customer of Café Warehouse with a Patrat . The player will receive a Fluffy Tail as a token of appreciation if they return on a Sunday .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A handkerchief dropped by a regular at the Café Warehouse. It smells faintly like a Pokémon. S V A handkerchief dropped by a regular at Nacrene City's Café Warehouse. It smells faintly like a Pokémon.
